nodes.name: Fillout Form Submission
nodes.notes:
TRIGGER: Receives POST from Fillout form webhook
Tool: n8n Webhook
Security: Header auth enabled, raw body disabled
Estimated run time: 0s (trigger)
Possible failure mode: Fillout webhook URL misconfigured, n8n instance offline

nodes.name: Transform & Clean Data
nodes.notes:
STEP 1: Data transformation + validation
Tool: n8n Code (JavaScript)
Data transformation: ClientName title-case, ClientEmail lowercase+trim, Phone strip non-numeric, Date reformatted to ISO + display format
Data validation: Email regex check (_emailValid), Name not empty (_nameValid)

nodes.name: Valid Lead Data?
nodes.notes:
CONDITIONAL LOGIC (IF/ELSE):
IF _emailValid AND _nameValid > TRUE > continue
IF either fails > FALSE > Log validation failure

nodes.name: Log Lead to Google Sheets
nodes.notes: STEP 2: Append lead data to 'Proposals' tab (Google Sheets as CRM)

nodes.name: Generate Proposal Content
nodes.notes:
STEP 3: Generate HTML proposal from template
Data created: ProposalHtml, EmailSubject, PdfFileName

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ html: $json.ProposalHtml, name: $json.PdfFileName, margins: '15px 20px 15px 20px', paperSize: 'Letter', orientation: 'Portrait' }) }}

nodes.name: Generate PDF via PDF.co
nodes.notes:
STEP 4: API ENRICHMENT - Convert HTML to PDF via PDF.co
Retry logic: 2 retries, 3s delay

nodes.name: Parse PDF Response
nodes.notes:
STEP 5: Parse PDF.co response
Fallback: Sets _pdfGenerated=false if error

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.EmailSubject }}
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $json.ClientName }},

Thank you for your interest! Please find our proposal attached as a PDF.

You can also view/download it here: Download Proposal PDF

We'll follow up within 1 business day to discuss next steps.

Best regards,
The Sales Team

nodes.name: Send Proposal via Gmail
nodes.notes:
STEP 6: Send proposal email with PDF link
Retry logic: 2 retries, 3s delay

nodes.name: Email Sent Successfully?
nodes.notes:
CONDITIONAL LOGIC:
IF Gmail returns message ID > TRUE > update sheet
IF no ID > FALSE > mark failed

nodes.name: Update Sheet - Proposal Sent
nodes.notes: STEP 7A: Update status to 'Proposal Sent' with PDF URL

nodes.name: Notify Sales in Slack
nodes.notes:
NOTIFICATION: New proposal sent alert to #sales-proposals
Security: PII removed (no email, phone, PDF URL); requirements truncated to 100 chars

nodes.name: Mark Send Failed
nodes.notes: STEP 7B-ALT: Mark as Send Failed in sheet

nodes.name: Alert Ops - Send Failed
nodes.notes: NOTIFICATION: Proposal send failure alert to #ops-alerts

nodes.name: Log Validation Failure
nodes.notes: STEP 2-ALT: Log incomplete submissions with Status='Validation Failed - Missing Data'

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: ERROR HANDLING: Catches any unhandled workflow errors

nodes.name: Send Error Alert
nodes.notes: ERROR NOTIFICATION: Alert ops team via #ops-alerts

nodes.name: Log Error to Sheet
nodes.notes: ERROR HANDLING: Store error + original input to Google Sheets Error Log tab

nodes.name: Send Success Notification
nodes.notes: SUCCESS NOTIFICATION: Confirm proposal workflow completed via #sales-proposals

rubric_checklist.A_trigger: Fillout Form Submission (Webhook, POST /fillout-proposal, headerAuth enabled)
rubric_checklist.B_data_transformation: Transform & Clean Data (Code node): ClientName title-case, ClientEmail lowercase+trim, Phone strip non-numeric, Date reformatted, Email regex validation, Name presence validation
rubric_checklist.C_api_enrichment: Generate PDF via PDF.co (HTTP Request -> api.pdf.co): HTML-to-PDF conversion with retry 2x/3s
D_conditional_logic: Valid Lead Data? (IF): _emailValid AND _nameValid gates processing
Email Sent Successfully? (IF): Gmail message ID present routes to success/failure paths
rubric_checklist.E_ai_agent: N/A for Case 1 (proposal generation uses template-based Code node, not LLM)
F_output: Log Lead to Google Sheets (append): All normalized fields to Proposals tab
Update Sheet - Proposal Sent (appendOrUpdate): Status, ProposalSentAt, PdfUrl
Send Proposal via Gmail: HTML email with PDF download link
Notify Sales in Slack (#sales-proposals): Client name, company, budget, truncated requirements (PII removed)
Mark Send Failed + Alert Ops - Send Failed: Failure path with manual review alert

changes.fix: Added headerAuth authentication to webhook trigger to prevent unauthorized submissions
Removed PII from Slack notification to prevent data leakage in channel messages

security_fixes.rationale: Slack channels are broadly visible; client email, phone, and PDF URLs should not be exposed in notification messages. Webhook authentication prevents spoofed form submissions.

error_handling.error_trigger: Error Trigger (global catch) fires on any unhandled error
error_handling.store_error: Log Error to Sheet (Google Sheets -> Error Log tab): Stores Workflow, RunID, Timestamp, ErrorType, FailedNode, OriginalInput
error_handling.notify_team: Send Error Alert (Slack -> #ops-alerts): Rubric-format template with Workflow, Run ID, Time, Error Type
fallback_paths: Valid Lead Data?: Routes invalid submissions to Log Validation Failure (skip record)
Email Sent Successfully?: Routes failed sends to Mark Send Failed + Alert Ops (manual review)
Parse PDF Response: Sets _pdfGenerated=false if PDF.co returns error
error_handling.success_notification: Send Success Notification (Slack -> #sales-proposals): Records processed + timestamp

data_transformation.dates: Reformatted to ISO timestamp (SubmittedAt) and display format (DisplayDate)
data_transformation.proposal_html: Generated from template with client data interpolation

api_enrichment.pdf_co: HTML-to-PDF conversion via PDF.co API - generates downloadable proposal document

data_validation.email_format: Regex validation in Transform & Clean Data (_emailValid flag)
data_validation.name_presence: Non-empty check in Transform & Clean Data (_nameValid flag)
data_validation.combined_gate: Valid Lead Data? IF node requires both _emailValid AND _nameValid

assumptions: Google Sheet has 'Proposals' tab with columns: ClientName, ClientEmail, CompanyName, CompanyWebsite, ProjectRequirements, BudgetRange, Phone, SubmittedAt, Status, ProposalSentAt, PdfUrl
Google Sheet has 'Error Log' tab with columns: Workflow, RunID, Timestamp, ErrorType, FailedNode, OriginalInput
PDF.co API key configured in HTTP Header Auth credentials (x-api-key header)
Gmail OAuth2 configured for sending proposal emails
Slack OAuth2 configured with access to #sales-proposals and #ops-alerts channels
Fillout form webhook configured to POST to n8n webhook URL /fillout-proposal
Webhook header auth credential configured to validate incoming Fillout requests
